description: The number of gestation and near-fulfillment - nine months, nine as three times three. It represents the final stage before completion, pregnant with possibility.
rationale: The word 'whai' begins with the open, questioning 'wha', suggesting anticipation. The vowel hiatus 'a-i' creates a rising movement from openness to focused completion, perfectly capturing nine's nature as the threshold before ten. This FV.V pattern gives it an expectant quality.
